subcodes.first_line: O ye spiritual friends and companions in conscience of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Jináb-i-Naṣru'lláh Khán, praised be God, under the sheltering protection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جان و وجدان عبدالبهاء جناب نصرالله خان الحمد لله در صون حمایت جمال
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @growth of the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness
